verses.greek: ⸀Συμεὼν Πέτρος δοῦλος καὶ ἀπόστολος Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ τοῖς ἰσότιμον ἡμῖν λαχοῦσιν πίστιν ἐν δικαιοσύνῃ τοῦ θεοῦ ἡμῶν καὶ σωτῆρος Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ·
verses.mistral: Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ, to those who have obtained a faith of equal standing with us in the righteousness of our God and Savior Jesus Christ:
verses.kjv: Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ, to them that have obtained like precious faith with us through the righteousness of God and our Saviour Jesus Christ:

words.gloss: an apostle, a messenger, an envoy, a delegate
I obtain by lot, cast lots

verses.greek: χάρις ὑμῖν καὶ εἰρήνη πληθυνθείη ἐν ἐπιγνώσει τοῦ θεοῦ καὶ Ἰησοῦ τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν.
verses.mistral: Grace and peace be multiplied to you in the knowledge of God and of Jesus our Lord.
verses.kjv: Grace and peace be multiplied unto you through the knowledge of God, and of Jesus our Lord,

verses.greek: Ὡς πάντα ἡμῖν τῆς θείας δυνάμεως αὐτοῦ τὰ πρὸς ζωὴν καὶ εὐσέβειαν δεδωρημένης διὰ τῆς ἐπιγνώσεως τοῦ καλέσαντος ἡμᾶς ⸂ἰδίᾳ δόξῃ καὶ ἀρετῇ⸃,
verses.mistral: According to the divine power granted to us, through the knowledge of the one who called us by His own glory and excellence.
verses.kjv: According as his divine power hath given unto us all things that pertain unto life and godliness, through the knowledge of him that hath called us to glory and virtue:

words.gloss: as, like as, how, while, so that
all, the whole, every kind of
he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: δι’ ὧν τὰ ⸂τίμια καὶ μέγιστα ἡμῖν⸃ ἐπαγγέλματα δεδώρηται, ἵνα διὰ τούτων γένησθε θείας κοινωνοὶ φύσεως, ἀποφυγόντες τῆς ἐν ⸀τῷ κόσμῳ ἐν ἐπιθυμίᾳ φθορᾶς.
verses.mistral: According to the great and precious promises given to us, you have become participants of God's divine nature, escaping the corruption in the world caused by lust.
verses.kjv: Whereby are given unto us exceeding great and precious promises: that by these ye might be partakers of the divine nature, having escaped the corruption that is in the world through lust.

words.gloss: I come into being, am born
desire, eagerness for, inordinate desire, lust

verses.greek: καὶ αὐτὸ τοῦτο δὲ σπουδὴν πᾶσαν παρεισενέγκαντες ἐπιχορηγήσατε ἐν τῇ πίστει ὑμῶν τὴν ἀρετήν, ἐν δὲ τῇ ἀρετῇ τὴν γνῶσιν,
verses.mistral: And this very thing, diligently making every effort, you have supplied in your faith virtue; in which also knowledge.
verses.kjv: And beside this, giving all diligence, add to your faith virtue; and to virtue knowledge;

words.gloss: he, she, it, they, them, same
but, on the other hand, and
all, the whole, every kind of
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ἐν δὲ τῇ γνώσει τὴν ἐγκράτειαν, ἐν δὲ τῇ ἐγκρατείᾳ τὴν ὑπομονήν, ἐν δὲ τῇ ὑπομονῇ τὴν εὐσέβειαν,
verses.mistral: In knowledge, self-control; in self-control, patience; in patience, godliness.
verses.kjv: And to knowledge temperance; and to temperance patience; and to patience godliness;

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
but, on the other hand, and
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ἐν δὲ τῇ εὐσεβείᾳ τὴν φιλαδελφίαν, ἐν δὲ τῇ φιλαδελφίᾳ τὴν ἀγάπην·
verses.mistral: In godliness is brotherly kindness, in brotherly kindness is love.
verses.kjv: And to godliness brotherly kindness; and to brotherly kindness charity.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ταῦτα γὰρ ὑμῖν ὑπάρχοντα καὶ πλεονάζοντα οὐκ ἀργοὺς οὐδὲ ἀκάρπους καθίστησιν εἰς τὴν τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ ἐπίγνωσιν·
verses.mistral: These things are producing in you not only mere knowledge, but also the power of discernment for the understanding of the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.
verses.kjv: For if these things be in you, and abound, they make you that ye shall neither be barren nor unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.

words.gloss: I am, exist, am in possession

verses.greek: ᾧ γὰρ μὴ πάρεστιν ταῦτα, τυφλός ἐστιν μυωπάζων, λήθην λαβὼν τοῦ καθαρισμοῦ τῶν πάλαι αὐτοῦ ⸀ἁμαρτημάτων.
verses.mistral: Blind and unable to see, he is, having taken hold of the ignorance concerning the cleansing of his former sins.
verses.kjv: But he that lacketh these things is blind, and cannot see afar off, and hath forgotten that he was purged from his old sins.

words.gloss: he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: διὸ μᾶλλον, ἀδελφοί, σπουδάσατε βεβαίαν ὑμῶν τὴν κλῆσιν καὶ ἐκλογὴν ποιεῖσθαι· ταῦτα γὰρ ποιοῦντες οὐ μὴ πταίσητέ ποτε·
verses.mistral: More, brethren, make every effort to confirm your calling and election; for in this way you will never stumble.
verses.kjv: Wherefore the rather, brethren, give diligence to make your calling and election sure: for if ye do these things, ye shall never fall:

words.gloss: a choosing out, selecting, choice by God

verses.greek: οὕτως γὰρ πλουσίως ἐπιχορηγηθήσεται ὑμῖν ἡ εἴσοδος εἰς τὴν αἰώνιον βασιλείαν τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν καὶ σωτῆρος Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ.
verses.mistral: Thus, abundantly will the way to the eternal kingdom of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ be supplied to you.
verses.kjv: For so an entrance shall be ministered unto you abundantly into the everlasting kingdom of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ.

verses.greek: Διὸ ⸀μελλήσω ἀεὶ ὑμᾶς ὑπομιμνῄσκειν περὶ τούτων, καίπερ εἰδότας καὶ ἐστηριγμένους ἐν τῇ παρούσῃ ἀληθείᾳ.
verses.mistral: I will always remember you concerning these things, although you know and are established in the present truth.
verses.kjv: Wherefore I will not be negligent to put you always in remembrance of these things, though ye know them, and be established in the present truth.

verses.greek: δίκαιον δὲ ἡγοῦμαι, ἐφ’ ὅσον εἰμὶ ἐν τούτῳ τῷ σκηνώματι, διεγείρειν ὑμᾶς ἐν ὑπομνήσει,
verses.mistral: Righteous are I to be, as long as I am in this tabernacle, I intend to awaken you with reminder.
verses.kjv: Yea, I think it meet, as long as I am in this tabernacle, to stir you up by putting you in remembrance;

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
on, to, against, on the basis of, at
how much, how great, how many
I wake out of sleep, I arouse

verses.greek: εἰδὼς ὅτι ταχινή ἐστιν ἡ ἀπόθεσις τοῦ σκηνώματός μου, καθὼς καὶ ὁ κύριος ἡμῶν Ἰησοῦς Χριστὸς ἐδήλωσέν μοι·
verses.mistral: Knowing that my dwelling is swiftly coming to pass, as also our Lord Jesus Christ has shown me.
verses.kjv: Knowing that shortly I must put off this my tabernacle, even as our Lord Jesus Christ hath shewed me.

words.gloss: a putting off, a laying down

verses.greek: σπουδάσω δὲ καὶ ἑκάστοτε ἔχειν ὑμᾶς μετὰ τὴν ἐμὴν ἔξοδον τὴν τούτων μνήμην ποιεῖσθαι.
verses.mistral: I will strive eagerly and always have you remember these things after my departure.
verses.kjv: Moreover I will endeavour that ye may be able after my decease to have these things always in remembrance.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: Οὐ γὰρ σεσοφισμένοις μύθοις ἐξακολουθήσαντες ἐγνωρίσαμεν ὑμῖν τὴν τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ δύναμιν καὶ παρουσίαν, ἀλλ’ ἐπόπται γενηθέντες τῆς ἐκείνου μεγαλειότητος.
verses.mistral: We have not followed cleverly devised myths when we made known to you the power and coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, but we were eyewitnesses of his majesty.
verses.kjv: For we have not followed cunningly devised fables, when we made known unto you the power and coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, but were eyewitnesses of his majesty.

words.gloss: I come into being, am born

verses.greek: λαβὼν γὰρ παρὰ θεοῦ πατρὸς τιμὴν καὶ δόξαν φωνῆς ἐνεχθείσης αὐτῷ τοιᾶσδε ὑπὸ τῆς μεγαλοπρεποῦς δόξης· ⸂Ὁ υἱός μου ὁ ἀγαπητός μου οὗτός ἐστιν⸃, εἰς ὃν ἐγὼ εὐδόκησα—
verses.mistral: This taking up by the Father of glory and honor at his voice that came from the majestic glory, this is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.
verses.kjv: For he received from God the Father honour and glory, when there came such a voice to him from the excellent glory, This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.

words.gloss: he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: καὶ ταύτην τὴν φωνὴν ἡμεῖς ἠκούσαμεν ἐξ οὐρανοῦ ἐνεχθεῖσαν σὺν αὐτῷ ὄντες ἐν τῷ ⸂ἁγίῳ ὄρει⸃.
verses.mistral: And this voice that came from heaven we heard with him, being there in the holy mountain.
verses.kjv: And this voice which came from heaven we heard, when we were with him in the holy mount.

words.gloss: from out, out from among, from
he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: καὶ ἔχομεν βεβαιότερον τὸν προφητικὸν λόγον, ᾧ καλῶς ποιεῖτε προσέχοντες ὡς λύχνῳ φαίνοντι ἐν αὐχμηρῷ τόπῳ, ἕως οὗ ἡμέρα διαυγάσῃ καὶ φωσφόρος ἀνατείλῃ ἐν ταῖς καρδίαις ὑμῶν·
verses.mistral: And we have a more sure word of prophecy, to which you do well to pay heed as to a lamp shining in a dark place, until the day dawns and the morning star rises in your hearts.
verses.kjv: We have also a more sure word of prophecy; whereunto ye do well that ye take heed, as unto a light that shineth in a dark place, until the day dawn, and the day star arise in your hearts:

words.gloss: a word, speech, divine utterance, analogy
I pay attention to, devote myself to
as, like as, how, while, so that
I make to rise, I rise, shine

verses.greek: τοῦτο πρῶτον γινώσκοντες ὅτι πᾶσα προφητεία γραφῆς ἰδίας ἐπιλύσεως οὐ γίνεται,
verses.mistral: This firstly knows that every prophecy of scripture does not come from personal interpretation.
verses.kjv: Knowing this first, that no prophecy of the scripture is of any private interpretation.

words.gloss: I come to know, learn, realize
all, the whole, every kind of
a writing, passage of scripture, the scriptures
I come into being, am born

verses.greek: οὐ γὰρ θελήματι ἀνθρώπου ἠνέχθη ⸂προφητεία ποτέ⸃, ἀλλὰ ὑπὸ πνεύματος ἁγίου φερόμενοι ἐλάλησαν ⸀ἀπὸ θεοῦ ἄνθρωποι.
verses.mistral: Human beings were carried along by the Holy Spirit, speaking from God.
verses.kjv: For the prophecy came not in old time by the will of man: but holy men of God spake as they were moved by the Holy Ghost.

words.gloss: a man, one of the human race
a man, one of the human race

verses.greek: Ἐγένοντο δὲ καὶ ψευδοπροφῆται ἐν τῷ λαῷ, ὡς καὶ ἐν ὑμῖν ἔσονται ψευδοδιδάσκαλοι, οἵτινες παρεισάξουσιν αἱρέσεις ἀπωλείας, καὶ τὸν ἀγοράσαντα αὐτοὺς δεσπότην ἀρνούμενοι, ἐπάγοντες ἑαυτοῖς ταχινὴν ἀπώλειαν·
verses.mistral: Emerged also false prophets among the people, as among you there will be false teachers who introduce heresies leading to destruction, and denying the Master who bought them, bringing swift destruction upon themselves.
verses.kjv: But there were false prophets also among the people, even as there shall be false teachers among you, who privily shall bring in damnable heresies, even denying the Lord that bought them, and bring upon themselves swift destruction.

words.gloss: I come into being, am born
but, on the other hand, and
as, like as, how, while, so that
he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: καὶ πολλοὶ ἐξακολουθήσουσιν αὐτῶν ταῖς ἀσελγείαις, δι’ οὓς ἡ ὁδὸς τῆς ἀληθείας βλασφημηθήσεται·
verses.mistral: Many will follow their immorality, resulting in the way of truth being blasphemed.
verses.kjv: And many shall follow their pernicious ways; by reason of whom the way of truth shall be evil spoken of.

words.gloss: he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: καὶ ἐν πλεονεξίᾳ πλαστοῖς λόγοις ὑμᾶς ἐμπορεύσονται· οἷς τὸ κρίμα ἔκπαλαι οὐκ ἀργεῖ, καὶ ἡ ἀπώλεια αὐτῶν οὐ ⸀νυστάζει.
verses.mistral: And in their covetousness they will exploit the foolish, promising them freedom while themselves being slaves of corruption; for a repayment of their erring they are not reluctant, and their destruction does not tarry.
verses.kjv: And through covetousness shall they with feigned words make merchandise of you: whose judgment now of a long time lingereth not, and their damnation slumbereth not.

words.gloss: a word, speech, divine utterance, analogy
I travel as a merchant, engage in trade
he, she, it, they, them, same
I nod in sleep, am drowsy, slumber

verses.greek: Εἰ γὰρ ὁ θεὸς ἀγγέλων ἁμαρτησάντων οὐκ ἐφείσατο, ἀλλὰ ⸀σειραῖς ζόφου ταρταρώσας παρέδωκεν εἰς κρίσιν τηρουμένους,
verses.mistral: If indeed God did not spare the angels who sinned, but cast them into hell and committed them to pits of deep darkness, reserved in chains for judgment.
verses.kjv: For if God spared not the angels that sinned, but cast them down to hell, and delivered them into chains of darkness, to be reserved unto judgment;

verses.greek: καὶ ἀρχαίου κόσμου οὐκ ἐφείσατο, ἀλλὰ ὄγδοον Νῶε δικαιοσύνης κήρυκα ἐφύλαξεν, κατακλυσμὸν κόσμῳ ἀσεβῶν ἐπάξας,
verses.mistral: And of the ancient world he did not spare, but saved Noah, the eighth person of righteousness, through flooding the ungodly world.
verses.kjv: And spared not the old world, but saved Noah the eighth person, a preacher of righteousness, bringing in the flood upon the world of the ungodly;

verses.greek: καὶ πόλεις Σοδόμων καὶ Γομόρρας τεφρώσας ⸀καταστροφῇ κατέκρινεν, ὑπόδειγμα μελλόντων ⸀ἀσεβέσιν τεθεικώς,
verses.mistral: Destroyed the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by reducing them to ashes, serving as a warning for the unrighteous in the future.
verses.kjv: And turning the cities of Sodom and Gomorrha into ashes condemned them with an overthrow, making them an ensample unto those that after should live ungodly;

verses.greek: καὶ δίκαιον Λὼτ καταπονούμενον ὑπὸ τῆς τῶν ἀθέσμων ἐν ἀσελγείᾳ ἀναστροφῆς ἐρρύσατο—
verses.mistral: Righteous Lot, delivered from the wickedness that enveloped them by God.
verses.kjv: And delivered just Lot, vexed with the filthy conversation of the wicked:

verses.greek: βλέμματι γὰρ καὶ ἀκοῇ ⸀ὁ δίκαιος ἐγκατοικῶν ἐν αὐτοῖς ἡμέραν ἐξ ἡμέρας ψυχὴν δικαίαν ἀνόμοις ἔργοις ἐβασάνιζεν—
verses.mistral: Condemned the unrighteous with his righteous life
verses.kjv: (For that righteous man dwelling among them, in seeing and hearing, vexed his righteous soul from day to day with their unlawful deeds;)

words.gloss: he, she, it, they, them, same
from out, out from among, from

verses.greek: οἶδεν κύριος εὐσεβεῖς ἐκ πειρασμοῦ ῥύεσθαι, ἀδίκους δὲ εἰς ἡμέραν κρίσεως κολαζομένους τηρεῖν,
verses.mistral: Righteous ones know that the Lord delivers from trials, but unrighteous ones He reserves for a day of judgment.
verses.kjv: The Lord knoweth how to deliver the godly out of temptations, and to reserve the unjust unto the day of judgment to be punished:

words.gloss: from out, out from among, from
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: μάλιστα δὲ τοὺς ὀπίσω σαρκὸς ἐν ἐπιθυμίᾳ μιασμοῦ πορευομένους καὶ κυριότητος καταφρονοῦντας. Τολμηταί, αὐθάδεις, δόξας οὐ τρέμουσιν, βλασφημοῦντες,
verses.mistral: Mostly, those following after the flesh in sensual lust for the defilement and disdaining of lordship. Bold, reckless, unshaken in glory, blaspheming,
verses.kjv: But chiefly them that walk after the flesh in the lust of uncleanness, and despise government. Presumptuous are they, selfwilled, they are not afraid to speak evil of dignities.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
desire, eagerness for, inordinate desire, lust

verses.greek: ὅπου ἄγγελοι ἰσχύϊ καὶ δυνάμει μείζονες ὄντες οὐ φέρουσιν κατ’ ⸀αὐτῶν βλάσφημον κρίσιν.
verses.mistral: Powerful and mighty angels, despite their superior strength, do not bear blasphemy against them.
verses.kjv: Whereas angels, which are greater in power and might, bring not railing accusation against them before the Lord.

words.gloss: down from, against, according to, throughout, during
he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: οὗτοι δέ, ὡς ἄλογα ζῷα ⸂γεγεννημένα φυσικὰ⸃ εἰς ἅλωσιν καὶ φθοράν, ἐν οἷς ἀγνοοῦσιν βλασφημοῦντες, ἐν τῇ φθορᾷ αὐτῶν ⸂καὶ φθαρήσονται⸃,
verses.mistral: These are waterless clouds, brought forth for a rainstorm, to whom the mist of darkness is reserved. In their own destruction, they will perish, while speaking blasphemy.
verses.kjv: But these, as natural brute beasts, made to be taken and destroyed, speak evil of the things that they understand not; and shall utterly perish in their own corruption;

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
as, like as, how, while, so that
I beget, bring forth, give birth to
I do not know, am ignorant of
he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: ⸀ἀδικούμενοι μισθὸν ἀδικίας· ἡδονὴν ἡγούμενοι τὴν ἐν ἡμέρᾳ τρυφήν, σπίλοι καὶ μῶμοι ἐντρυφῶντες ἐν ταῖς ⸀ἀπάταις αὐτῶν συνευωχούμενοι ὑμῖν,
verses.mistral: Unjustly receiving wages for wickedness, they indulge in sensuality in the day of gluttony, wallowing in deceptions as they feast with you on your own corruption.
verses.kjv: And shall receive the reward of unrighteousness, as they that count it pleasure to riot in the day time. Spots they are and blemishes, sporting themselves with their own deceivings while they feast with you;

words.gloss: he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: ὀφθαλμοὺς ἔχοντες μεστοὺς μοιχαλίδος καὶ ⸀ἀκαταπαύστους ἁμαρτίας, δελεάζοντες ψυχὰς ἀστηρίκτους, καρδίαν γεγυμνασμένην πλεονεξίας ἔχοντες, κατάρας τέκνα,
verses.mistral: Corrupters, having eyes full of adultery and unceasing in wickedness, they enslave minds, hearts set on greed, cursing children.
verses.kjv: Having eyes full of adultery, and that cannot cease from sin; beguiling unstable souls: an heart they have exercised with covetous practices; cursed children:

words.gloss: I allure, entice by a bait

verses.greek: ⸀καταλιπόντες εὐθεῖαν ὁδὸν ἐπλανήθησαν, ἐξακολουθήσαντες τῇ ὁδῷ τοῦ Βαλαὰμ τοῦ ⸀Βοσὸρ ὃς μισθὸν ἀδικίας ἠγάπησεν
verses.mistral: Abandoning the straight path, they were led astray, following the way of Balaam the son of Beor, who loved the wage of wickedness.
verses.kjv: Which have forsaken the right way, and are gone astray, following the way of Balaam the son of Bosor, who loved the wages of unrighteousness;

verses.greek: ἔλεγξιν δὲ ἔσχεν ἰδίας παρανομίας· ὑποζύγιον ἄφωνον ἐν ἀνθρώπου φωνῇ φθεγξάμενον ἐκώλυσεν τὴν τοῦ προφήτου παραφρονίαν.
verses.mistral: Condemned, however, was his own unrighteousness; for he obtained a recompense for his conduct in the person of a donkey speaking with a human voice, who stopped the prophet's madness.
verses.kjv: But was rebuked for his iniquity: the dumb ass speaking with man's voice forbad the madness of the prophet.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
a beast of burden, an ass or mule
a man, one of the human race

verses.greek: Οὗτοί εἰσιν πηγαὶ ἄνυδροι ⸂καὶ ὁμίχλαι⸃ ὑπὸ λαίλαπος ἐλαυνόμεναι, οἷς ὁ ζόφος τοῦ ⸀σκότους τετήρηται.
verses.mistral: These are waterless pitfalls and unproductive clouds, brought along by a tempest, to which the darkness of the obscurity has been preserved.
verses.kjv: These are wells without water, clouds that are carried with a tempest; to whom the mist of darkness is reserved for ever.

verses.greek: ὑπέρογκα γὰρ ματαιότητος φθεγγόμενοι δελεάζουσιν ἐν ἐπιθυμίαις σαρκὸς ἀσελγείαις τοὺς ⸀ὀλίγως ⸀ἀποφεύγοντας τοὺς ἐν πλάνῃ ἀναστρεφομένους,
verses.mistral: Lying likenesses of wickedness they are, speaking boastfully in their depraved desires, ensnaring the weak who have just escaped from those living in error.
verses.kjv: For when they speak great swelling words of vanity, they allure through the lusts of the flesh, through much wantonness, those that were clean escaped from them who live in error.

words.gloss: I allure, entice by a bait
desire, eagerness for, inordinate desire, lust
I overturn, turn upside down, return, mid. and pass: I conduct myself, live

verses.greek: ἐλευθερίαν αὐτοῖς ἐπαγγελλόμενοι, αὐτοὶ δοῦλοι ὑπάρχοντες τῆς φθορᾶς· ᾧ γάρ τις ἥττηται, τούτῳ ⸀καὶ δεδούλωται.
verses.mistral: They promise them freedom, but they themselves are slaves of decay, for whoever has been overcome by it has become subject to it.
verses.kjv: While they promise them liberty, they themselves are the servants of corruption: for of whom a man is overcome, of the same is he brought in bondage.

words.gloss: he, she, it, they, them, same
he, she, it, they, them, same
I am, exist, am in possession

verses.greek: εἰ γὰρ ἀποφυγόντες τὰ μιάσματα τοῦ κόσμου ἐν ἐπιγνώσει τοῦ ⸀κυρίου καὶ σωτῆρος Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ τούτοις δὲ πάλιν ἐμπλακέντες ἡττῶνται, γέγονεν αὐτοῖς τὰ ἔσχατα χείρονα τῶν πρώτων.
verses.mistral: Fleeing from the defilements of the world by the knowledge of the Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, if they again yield, their latter condition has become worse than the former.
verses.kjv: For if after they have escaped the pollutions of the world through the knowledge of the Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ, they are again entangled therein, and overcome, the latter end is worse with them than the beginning.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
again, further, on the other hand
I come into being, am born
he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: κρεῖττον γὰρ ἦν αὐτοῖς μὴ ἐπεγνωκέναι τὴν ὁδὸν τῆς δικαιοσύνης ἢ ἐπιγνοῦσιν ⸀ὑποστρέψαι ἐκ τῆς παραδοθείσης αὐτοῖς ἁγίας ἐντολῆς·
verses.mistral: Better for them it was not to know the way of righteousness, than after knowing, to turn away from the holy commandment given to them.
verses.kjv: For it had been better for them not to have known the way of righteousness, than, after they have known it, to turn from the holy commandment delivered unto them.

verses.greek: ⸀συμβέβηκεν αὐτοῖς τὸ τῆς ἀληθοῦς παροιμίας· Κύων ἐπιστρέψας ἐπὶ τὸ ἴδιον ἐξέραμα, καί· Ὗς λουσαμένη εἰς ⸀κυλισμὸν βορβόρου.
verses.mistral: Turned back the dog to his own vomit, and the sow that was washed to her wallowing in the mire.
verses.kjv: But it is happened unto them according to the true proverb, The dog is turned to his own vomit again; and the sow that was washed to her wallowing in the mire.

verses.greek: Ταύτην ἤδη, ἀγαπητοί, δευτέραν ὑμῖν γράφω ἐπιστολήν, ἐν αἷς διεγείρω ὑμῶν ἐν ὑπομνήσει τὴν εἰλικρινῆ διάνοιαν,
verses.mistral: I already write the second letter to you, beloved, in which I stir up your remembrance, by way of reminder, to the genuine (or sincere) thinking.
verses.kjv: This second epistle, beloved, I now write unto you; in both which I stir up your pure minds by way of remembrance:

words.gloss: second, in the second place, for the second time
I wake out of sleep, I arouse

verses.greek: μνησθῆναι τῶν προειρημένων ῥημάτων ὑπὸ τῶν ἁγίων προφητῶν καὶ τῆς τῶν ἀποστόλων ὑμῶν ἐντολῆς τοῦ κυρίου καὶ σωτῆρος,
verses.mistral: Recall the words previously spoken by the holy prophets and the commandment of your apostles, the Lord and Savior.
verses.kjv: PETER

words.gloss: an apostle, a messenger, an envoy, a delegate

verses.greek: τοῦτο πρῶτον γινώσκοντες ὅτι ἐλεύσονται ἐπ’ ⸀ἐσχάτων τῶν ἡμερῶν ⸂ἐν ἐμπαιγμονῇ⸃ ἐμπαῖκται κατὰ τὰς ἰδίας ἐπιθυμίας αὐτῶν πορευόμενοι
verses.mistral: This first know that they are coming in the last days, according to their own desires, carrying out their desires. (2 Peter 3:3)
verses.kjv: Knowing this first, that there shall come in the last days scoffers, walking after their own lusts,

verses.greek: καὶ λέγοντες· Ποῦ ἐστιν ἡ ἐπαγγελία τῆς παρουσίας αὐτοῦ; ἀφ’ ἧς γὰρ οἱ πατέρες ἐκοιμήθησαν, πάντα οὕτως διαμένει ἀπ’ ἀρχῆς κτίσεως.
verses.mistral: Where is the promise of his coming? For since the fathers fell asleep, all things continue as they were from the beginning of creation.
verses.kjv: And saying, Where is the promise of his coming? for since the fathers fell asleep, all things continue as they were from the beginning of the creation.

verses.greek: λανθάνει γὰρ αὐτοὺς τοῦτο θέλοντας ὅτι οὐρανοὶ ἦσαν ἔκπαλαι καὶ γῆ ἐξ ὕδατος καὶ δι’ ὕδατος συνεστῶσα τῷ τοῦ θεοῦ λόγῳ,
verses.mistral: The heavens existed formerly, and the earth was formed out of water, through which by the word of God the world was made.
verses.kjv: For this they willingly are ignorant of, that by the word of God the heavens were of old, and the earth standing out of the water and in the water:

verses.greek: δι’ ὧν ὁ τότε κόσμος ὕδατι κατακλυσθεὶς ἀπώλετο·
verses.mistral: Through which, in that time, the world was flooded and perished by water.
verses.kjv: Whereby the world that then was, being overflowed with water, perished:

verses.greek: οἱ δὲ νῦν οὐρανοὶ καὶ ἡ γῆ τῷ ⸀αὐτῷ λόγῳ τεθησαυρισμένοι εἰσὶν πυρὶ τηρούμενοι εἰς ἡμέραν κρίσεως καὶ ἀπωλείας τῶν ἀσεβῶν ἀνθρώπων.
verses.mistral: The present heavens and earth are being stored in fire, being kept for the day of judgment and destruction of ungodly people.
verses.kjv: But the heavens and the earth, which are now, by the same word are kept in store, reserved unto fire against the day of judgment and perdition of ungodly men.

verses.greek: Ἓν δὲ τοῦτο μὴ λανθανέτω ὑμᾶς, ἀγαπητοί, ὅτι μία ἡμέρα παρὰ κυρίῳ ὡς χίλια ἔτη καὶ χίλια ἔτη ὡς ἡμέρα μία.
verses.mistral: One thing I want to make clear to you, dear friends, is that with the Lord one day is like a thousand years and a thousand years are like one day.
verses.kjv: But, beloved, be not ignorant of this one thing, that one day is with the Lord as a thousand years, and a thousand years as one day.

as, like as, how, while, so that

verses.greek: οὐ βραδύνει ⸀κύριος τῆς ἐπαγγελίας, ὥς τινες βραδύτητα ἡγοῦνται, ἀλλὰ μακροθυμεῖ εἰς ⸀ὑμᾶς, μὴ βουλόμενός τινας ἀπολέσθαι ἀλλὰ πάντας εἰς μετάνοιαν χωρῆσαι.
verses.mistral: The Lord is not slow about His promise, as some understand slowness, but is patient toward you, not wishing for any to perish but for all to come to repentance.
verses.kjv: The Lord is not slack concerning his promise, as some men count slackness; but is longsuffering to us-ward, not willing that any should perish, but that all should come to repentance.

verses.greek: ἥξει δὲ ⸀ἡμέρα κυρίου ὡς ⸀κλέπτης, ἐν ᾗ οἱ οὐρανοὶ ῥοιζηδὸν παρελεύσονται, στοιχεῖα δὲ καυσούμενα ⸀λυθήσεται, καὶ γῆ καὶ τὰ ἐν αὐτῇ ἔργα ⸀εὑρεθήσεται.
verses.mistral: The day of the Lord will come like a thief, in which the heavens will pass away with a roar, and the elements will be burned up, and the earth and the works on it will be exposed.
verses.kjv: But the day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night; in the which the heavens shall pass away with a great noise, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat, the earth also and the works that are therein shall be burned up.

verses.greek: Τούτων ⸀οὕτως πάντων λυομένων ποταποὺς δεῖ ὑπάρχειν ὑμᾶς ἐν ἁγίαις ἀναστροφαῖς καὶ εὐσεβείαις,
verses.mistral: Maintain yourselves in holy conduct and godliness.
verses.kjv: Seeing then that all these things shall be dissolved, what manner of persons ought ye to be in all holy conversation and godliness,

verses.greek: προσδοκῶντας καὶ σπεύδοντας τὴν παρουσίαν τῆς τοῦ θεοῦ ἡμέρας, δι’ ἣν οὐρανοὶ πυρούμενοι λυθήσονται καὶ στοιχεῖα καυσούμενα τήκεται·
verses.mistral: Anticipating and longing for the coming of the day of God, upon which the heavens will be dissolved with burning and the elements will melt with fervent heat.
verses.kjv: Looking for and hasting unto the coming of the day of God, wherein the heavens being on fire shall be dissolved, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat?

verses.greek: καινοὺς δὲ οὐρανοὺς καὶ γῆν καινὴν κατὰ τὸ ἐπάγγελμα αὐτοῦ προσδοκῶμεν, ἐν οἷς δικαιοσύνη κατοικεῖ.
verses.mistral: New heavens and a new earth according to His promise, in which righteousness dwells.
verses.kjv: Nevertheless we, according to his promise, look for new heavens and a new earth, wherein dwelleth righteousness.

verses.greek: Διό, ἀγαπητοί, ταῦτα προσδοκῶντες σπουδάσατε ἄσπιλοι καὶ ἀμώμητοι αὐτῷ εὑρεθῆναι ἐν εἰρήνῃ,
verses.mistral: Prepare diligently, dearly beloved, to be found by Him in peace, spotless and blameless.
verses.kjv: Wherefore, beloved, seeing that ye look for such things, be diligent that ye may be found of him in peace, without spot, and blameless.

verses.greek: καὶ τὴν τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν μακροθυμίαν σωτηρίαν ἡγεῖσθε, καθὼς καὶ ὁ ἀγαπητὸς ἡμῶν ἀδελφὸς Παῦλος κατὰ τὴν ⸂δοθεῖσαν αὐτῷ⸃ σοφίαν ἔγραψεν ὑμῖν,
verses.mistral: And regard the longsuffering of our Lord as salvation, just as also our beloved brother Paul, according to the wisdom given to him, wrote to you,
verses.kjv: And account that the longsuffering of our Lord is salvation; even as our beloved brother Paul also according to the wisdom given unto him hath written unto you;

verses.greek: ὡς καὶ ἐν πάσαις ⸀ταῖς ἐπιστολαῖς λαλῶν ἐν αὐταῖς περὶ τούτων, ἐν ⸀αἷς ἐστιν δυσνόητά τινα, ἃ οἱ ἀμαθεῖς καὶ ἀστήρικτοι στρεβλοῦσιν ὡς καὶ τὰς λοιπὰς γραφὰς πρὸς τὴν ἰδίαν αὐτῶν ἀπώλειαν.
verses.mistral: As in all his letters, even this one, where some things are hard to understand, which the ignorant and unstable twist as they do the other scriptures to their own destruction.
verses.kjv: As also in all his epistles, speaking in them of these things; in which are some things hard to be understood, which they that are unlearned and unstable wrest, as they do also the other scriptures, unto their own destruction.

verses.greek: ὑμεῖς οὖν, ἀγαπητοί, προγινώσκοντες φυλάσσεσθε ἵνα μὴ τῇ τῶν ἀθέσμων πλάνῃ συναπαχθέντες ἐκπέσητε τοῦ ἰδίου στηριγμοῦ,
verses.mistral: You therefore, beloved, knowing this beforehand, beware lest being led away by the error of the lawless, you sink from your own steadfastness.
verses.kjv: Ye therefore, beloved, seeing ye know these things before, beware lest ye also, being led away with the error of the wicked, fall from your own stedfastness.

verses.greek: αὐξάνετε δὲ ἐν χάριτι καὶ γνώσει τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν καὶ σωτῆρος Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ. αὐτῷ ἡ δόξα καὶ νῦν καὶ εἰς ἡμέραν αἰῶνος. ⸀ἀμήν.
verses.mistral: Grow in grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. To Him be the glory both now and to the day of eternity. Amen.
verses.kjv: But grow in grace, and in the knowledge of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ. To him be glory both now and for ever. Amen.
